clauses.text: Employee acknowledges that during employment, Employee will have access to and become acquainted with trade secrets and confidential information belonging to Employer.
Employee agrees that for a period of twelve months following termination of employment, Employee will not directly or indirectly engage in any business competitive with the Employer.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Washington.
Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time, with or without cause, upon fourteen days written notice to the other party.
Employee agrees that any inventions, discoveries, or improvements made by Employee during employment relating to Employer's business shall be the sole property of Employer.
